fixes.origin:
source_file = os.path.join(workspace, requested)

with open(source_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
    content = fp.read()
fixes.replacement:
source_file = os.path.join(workspace, requested)
base_path = os.path.abspath(workspace)
resolved = os.path.abspath(source_file)
if os.path.commonpath([base_path, resolved]) != base_path:
    abort(400)

with open(resolved, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
    content = fp.read()
